component.name: Folia
component.summary: Lyrics-focused online and local music player

description.p: This is a community package of Folia, maintained independently and unaffiliated with the Folia project.

Folia is a fullscreen lyrics-first music player built on Electron. It supports online music playback, local music libraries, lyrics matching, LRC file recognition, Now Playing integration and AI-generated visual themes.

Permissions: by default this package grants network, display, audio, graphics acceleration, notifications and optional Secret Service access. Local music folders are expected to be selected through the file chooser portal; broad home or music-directory access is not granted by default. If a library workflow needs direct persistent filesystem paths, enable it with "flatpak override":

ul.li: Music directory access: flatpak override --user --filesystem=xdg-music:ro top.izuna.foliamajor
Whole home library access: flatpak override --user --filesystem=home:ro top.izuna.foliamajor
